message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor User
participant BaseExecutor
participant JdbcTransaction
participant PooledDataSource
participant PooledConnection
participant Proxy
participant Connection

User -> BaseExecutor : getConnection
BaseExecutor -> JdbcTransaction : getConnection
JdbcTransaction -> JdbcTransaction : openConnection
JdbcTransaction -> PooledDataSource : getConnection
PooledDataSource -> PooledDataSource : popConnection
PooledDataSource -> PooledConnection : <create>
PooledConnection -> Proxy : newProxyInstance
Proxy -> Proxy : 创建Connection代理类对象
PooledConnection --> PooledDataSource : 返回PooledConnection实例
PooledDataSource -> PooledConnection : isValid
PooledConnection -> PooledConnection : pingConnection
PooledConnection --> Connection : 检测连接是否有效
Connection --> PooledConnection : 连接是否有效标识
PooledDataSource --> PooledDataSource
PooledDataSource -> PooledConnection : getProxyConnection
PooledConnection --> PooledDataSource : 返回代理连接
PooledDataSource --> JdbcTransaction : 返回代理连接
JdbcTransaction -> Connection : setTransactionIsolation
JdbcTransaction --> JdbcTransaction : 设置隔离级别
JdbcTransaction -> JdbcTransaction : setDesiredAutoCommit
JdbcTransaction --> BaseExecutor : 设置提交模式
BaseExecutor --> BaseExecutor : 获取连接
BaseExecutor --> User : 通过jdbc获取数据库连接
User <-- User : 返回数据库连接

@enduml
```
